chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-447 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on office objections. For hearing of MA No.1791/2026. For hearing of main case. 21.04.2026 Mr. Altaf Hussain Solangi advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. M/s. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G. Sindh and Nazar Muhammad Memon A.P.G. Sindh along with Inspector Ghulam Qadir, PS Talhar District Badin. Mir Ashfaque Ali Talpur advocate for respondents No.6&7. The petitioners are present in Court along with their learned counsel. Petitioner No.1 submits that she is 23 years of age and is sui juris. She states that about one year ago, she was divorced by one Allahdad Naich and thereafter, out of her own free will and without any coercion or compulsion she contracted a lawful marriage with petitioner No.2, namely Ali Raza Sahito. She further submits that she has not been abducted by any person; however, her mother, respondent No.6, being aggrieved and displeased with the said marriage, has lodged a false FIR No.28 of 2026 at Police Station Talhar, District Badin, under Sections 365-B and 34 PPC. Today, the Investigating Officer is present and states that he has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1 under section 161 Cr.P.C., wherein she has reiterated the aforesaid facts and has categorically denied the allegations levelled in the FIR regarding kidnapping or wrongful confinement. In view of the statement of the alleged abductee, the Investigating Officer submits that he shall submit a report under Section 173 Cr.P.C. before the learned concerned Magistrate within seven days, for seeking appropriate orders in accordance with law.

Today, the Investigating Officer is present and states that he has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1 under section 161 Cr.P.C., wherein she has reiterated the aforesaid facts and has categorically denied the allegations levelled in the FIR regarding kidnapping or wrongful confinement. In view of the statement of the alleged abductee, the Investigating Officer submits that he shall submit a report under Section 173 Cr.P.C. before the learned concerned Magistrate within seven days, for seeking appropriate orders in accordance with law. Accordingly, the instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms, along with the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
